title: Oldest Known Stone Tools
description: The earliest known stone tools date to about 3.3 million years ago.

title: Homo erectus Appears
description: Homo erectus emerges and later spreads widely beyond Africa.

title: Fire Mastered
description: Evidence for the controlled use of fire appears during the early Stone Age.

title: Neanderthals Appear
description: Neanderthals emerge in Eurasia and become one of the best-known human relatives.

title: Chauvet Cave Art
description: Some of the world's most famous figurative cave paintings are created in France.

title: Agriculture
description: Humans begin farming and settling in multiple regions near the end of the Stone Age.
